channel.title: Google Trends on Susan Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Google Trends on Susan Chen

item.title: Project 2: Exo Google Trends
item.description: Google Trends allows user to search for at most 5 keywords at a time. This project demostrates how to search for more than 5 terms at once using the Google Trends API in python. Project Details: I also a medium article for this project. Repo Link
